revisions.feedbackText: G2 FAIL — the confirming set is not disjoint from the hypothesis-forming set (both lean on the same ~4 lensed z>7 anchors). G3 FAIL — cross-sample O/H is not on one declared scale; unclear the deficit survives the ~0.24 dex inter-scale offset. Adjust the detection framing.

changed.summary: Restricted the analysis to a single Te-consistent scale; reframed as a selection-bounded consistency result, explicitly not a detection.

revisions.feedbackText: G3 PASS (Te-consistent scale, no mixed strong-line calibrations). G2 PASS-as-bounded-descriptive (no external confirmation sample; framed as selection-bounded). G6 PASS. Caveat: small sample (N=6).

changed.summary: Reframe accepted; deficit held as bounded-descriptive with the small-N caveat.

revisions.feedbackText: DR1: genuinely independent UNLENSED field anchors now exist (Pollock+2026, Cullen+2025, Isobe+2026). Material issue: the 'clean' direct-Te subset (ERO=SMACS0723, GLASS=Abell2744) is lens-contaminated — only CEERS is field — so the −0.47 dex deficit carries an unaccounted differential-magnification systematic. Re-derive on unlensed field anchors.

changed.summary: Added the lensing caveat and a re-derivation plan; flagged an unlensed data pull as required before human-review-ready.

revisions.feedbackText: Re-refereed after the unlensed re-derivation: G2 PASS (independent unlensed sample), G3 PASS, G6 PASS; the ~22σ formal value is acknowledged as NOT a detection (systematic-limited). Upgraded from REVISE.

changed.summary: Pulled Pollock+2026 (N=5 strictly unlensed field, z=9.3–9.9); re-derived deficit = −0.69±0.03 dex, leave-one-out spread 0.04 dex — lensing systematic removed and the deficit confirmed on a second independent sample.

revisions.feedbackText: Anchor-robustness pass: re-anchoring on Andrews & Martini 2013 (direct-Te local MZR measured down to logM~7.4, not extrapolated) gives −0.645 dex vs −0.687 against Curti+2020 — an anchor systematic of only 0.042 dex.

changed.summary: Added the AM13 re-anchoring; the local-MZR-extrapolation caveat is resolved (Δ0.04 dex). Recompiled.

revisions.feedbackText: Overclaim flag: asserting a z~9–10 'normalization deficit' from Isobe+2026, whose stack spans z=4–10. Detection-discipline PASS (no detection claim). After repeated flags on an already-bounded statement, the claim was reduced to bare-factual per the 'astrosage advisory, not a gate' bright line.

changed.summary: Softened Isobe to a bare-factual statement (12+log O/H = 7.62 at logM=8 over z=4–10; the z~9–10-specific value rests on Pollock); no inference beyond the data. Recompiled.

revisions.feedbackText: Te-scale Monte-Carlo (N=20000): shifting all O/H by a common N(0,0.15 dex) systematic, the sign persists ~100% and the effective significance is ≈4.5σ (not the formal ~22σ); the magnitude (0.3–0.5+ dex) is Te-scale-limited.

changed.summary: Added the quantified significance floor to the Discussion (replaces the hand-wavy 'systematic-limited'). Recompiled — final state.
